translation: def headlessCompress(self, in_: list[int], inpos: "IntWrapper", inlength: int, out: list[int], outpos: "IntWrapper", initvalue: "IntWrapper") -> None:
mbits2 = Util.maxdiffbits(initoffset2, in_, s + self.BLOCK_SIZE, self.BLOCK_SIZE)
mbits3 = Util.maxdiffbits(initoffset3, in_, s + 2 * self.BLOCK_SIZE, self.BLOCK_SIZE)
mbits4 = Util.maxdiffbits(initoffset4, in_, s + 3 * self.BLOCK_SIZE, self.BLOCK_SIZE)
IntegratedBitPacking.integratedpack(initoffset2, in_, s + self.BLOCK_SIZE, out, tmpoutpos, mbits2)
IntegratedBitPacking.integratedpack(initoffset3, in_, s + 2 * self.BLOCK_SIZE, out, tmpoutpos, mbits3)
IntegratedBitPacking.integratedpack(initoffset4, in_, s + 3 * self.BLOCK_SIZE, out, tmpoutpos, mbits4)
